# Alejandro Cuba Ruiz

> Principal Front-End Engineer, Google Developer Expert in Angular, and ng-Champion based in Miami Beach, FL.

## About
This is the personal website and portfolio of Alejandro Cuba Ruiz.

- **Role**: Principal Front-End Engineer, Google Developer Expert (GDE) in Angular, ng-Champion, and host of the Angularidades podcast.
- **Location**: Miami Beach, FL, USA
- **Specialties**: Front-End Web Engineering, HTML5, CSS, JavaScript, Angular.
- **Handles**: @alejandrocuba, @alejandrocubaruiz, @zorphdark
